selection_policy.default_instruction: When the user asks what to work on, consult rank 1 first and state the assumption before acting.
selection_policy.when_user_asks_whats_next: Summarize the top ranked item plus any active editorial blockers or data-hardening warnings.
selection_policy.when_user_says_go: Proceed with rank 1 unless the user has named a different mode, track, bundle, or priority.

notes: Roadmap remains narrative context; this file is the operational dispatcher.
The top surveillance item intentionally prefers the next distinct target when the generated queue starts with a recently handled track.

work_items.title: Repair coverage for Circulating Factor Modulation
work_items.rationale: Run a bounded coverage-repair pass focused on human plasmapheresis and TPE biomarker evidence, young-donor plasma-exchange MCI evidence, unknown-status aging or frailty TPE registries, microplastics/toxin-removal TPE context, procedure safety and durability, recent review triangulation, and taxonomy separation across plasma dilution, young plasma, TPE with albumin or IVIG, plasmapheresis without replacement, phlebotomy, and single-factor candidate streams before ordinary surveillance resumes.
work_items.default_action: Run a coverage-repair pass against the latest assessment gaps; update public records only if the repair changes public boundaries.

work_items.title: Run field change check for Stem Cell Rejuvenation
work_items.rationale: Next distinct field-change target. Generated field-change queue rank 28; rank 1 was recently handled by a field change check or coverage-repair session.
work_items.default_action: Run one track-level field change check, record materiality, excluded sources, and a session; create a staged update only for a material public change.

work_items.title: Backfill coverage assessment for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation
work_items.rationale: 26 published baseline track(s) still lack internal coverage assessments; this is the highest-ranked unassessed track in the field-change queue.
work_items.default_action: Review the published outlook, session, staged update, evidence reviews, and public update, then create a coverage assessment without changing public records.
